c.d: Number of monthly active users on the platform. Higher is better for finding and connecting with more friends.
Variety of communication methods supported by the app (e.g., text, voice, video calls, direct messages, stories). More options provide flexibility.
Features that facilitate group communication and activities, such as group chats, shared calendars, and collaborative games.  Essential for staying connected with multiple friends at once.
Ability to share various types of content (photos, videos, links, files) easily.  Enables richer and more engaging interactions.
Availability on multiple operating systems and devices (iOS, Android, web). Ensures accessibility for all friends, regardless of their device preferences.
